ssm.resourcedatasync.awsorganizationssou: Information about the `AwsOrganizationsSource` resource data sync source. A sync source of this type can synchronize data from AWS Organizations or, if an AWS organization isn't present, from multiple AWS Regions.

ssm.resourcedatasync.awsorganizationssou.Description: The AWS Organizations organization units included in the sync.

If an AWS organization is present, this is either `OrganizationalUnits` or `EntireOrganization`. For `OrganizationalUnits`, the data is aggregated from a set of organization units. For `EntireOrganization`, the data is aggregated from the entire AWS organization.
